faq.a1: For private accounts, adding listings is completely free (up to 2 active and 4 per year). Business accounts can add listings within their subscription package.
faq.q2: How does the Start Program work for new dealers?
faq.a2: New business accounts can activate a free 3-month trial (Start Program) with a limit of 20 active listings. After the trial ends, a package purchase is required.
faq.a3: Prices for listings and promotions are shown as gross amounts (incl. 23% VAT). For business accounts we additionally show the net amount. A VAT invoice is issued for every transaction.
faq.q4: How long is the subscription active?
faq.a4: Business packages are billed monthly. After purchase, the subscription is active for 30 days from the payment date. Invoices are generated automatically.
faq.q5: Can I change my package during the subscription?
faq.a5: Yes, a package upgrade is possible at any time. The new package is activated immediately after the payment is booked.
faq.q6: What happens when the package expires?
faq.a6: When the subscription expires, the account switches to basic mode. Existing listings remain active until the end of their display time, but new ones cannot be added.

packages.metaDescription: Choose a subscription package for car dealers. Add unlimited listings, use promotions and grow your sales.
packages.heroDesc: One package. Unlimited listing options. VAT invoices every month.
packages.promoBanner: Launch promotion: all packages are now completely free!
packages.startProgramDesc: Up to 20 active listings · 90 days display · 3 promotions/month · account verified by CARIZO
packages.startProgramActiveTitle: You are using the free trial period
packages.startProgramActiveDesc: Valid until {date} · When it ends, choose a paid package.

faq.a1: The Start Program is a free 3-month trial for new dealers registered on CARIZO. It includes up to 20 active listings with 90 days display and 3 promotions per month. It can be activated only once per account.
faq.q2: When will I be charged for the package?
faq.a2: The charge is taken immediately after you select a package. You can extend subsequent months manually — there is no automatic renewal.
faq.q3: Will I receive a VAT invoice?
faq.a3: Yes. A VAT invoice is issued automatically after each payment is booked and is available in the “Invoices” panel.
faq.q4: What happens when the package expires?
faq.a4: Your listings remain visible until their individual display time expires. However, you will not be able to add new listings beyond the limit for accounts without a subscription (5 active).
faq.q5: How does the promotion limit work?
faq.a5: The promotion limit renews every month. A promotion is a service available in the listing promotion options — promoted offers appear higher in search results.
faq.a6: Enterprise is an offer for large dealer networks requiring individual contract terms, SLA and API. Contact us at kontakt@carizo.eu.
